meaning: n.贡献人,捐助者adj.贡献的,捐助的
examples: Alcohol is a contributory factor in 10% of all road accidents.
Further observation revealed the tendency of teachers to evaluate events rather than review the contributory factors in a considered manner by, in effect, standing outside the situation.
Countries could consider creating an affordable non-contributory scheme.
He added that an Office of Fair Trading report on the matter found three contributory factors.
And a fund must be built up to help those without a contributory scheme.
